name: Russian Beef Stroganoff Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Chuck steak or round (boneless Steak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 1/2-inch strips and place in a plastic bag with 3 tablespoons of flour and the salt. Shake until meat is evenly coated.
2. In a heavy skillet or Dutch oven, heat oil/shortening. Add meat strips and brown slowly, stirring often.
3. Add onion, garlic, COCA-COLA, and 1/4 cup water to the skillet; mix well. Cover and simmer 30 to 45 minutes or until meat is fork-tender.
4. In a bowl, mix 2 tablespoons of flour with 1/2 cup water until smooth. Stir into the meat mixture along with Worcestershire sauce and undrained mushrooms. Cook until thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes. (If making ahead for reheating later, do not add sour cream now; reheat before completing recipe.)
5. Stir in sour cream and heat gently just until the gravy simmers.
6. Sprinkle with parsley and serve over potatoes, noodles, or rice.
